description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy, using node:6 for the build and unit test jobs and alpine for the deploy job. In the build stage add a job named "build site" that runs npm install --progress=false then npm run build, and publishes the generated dist/ directory as an artifact that expires after one week. In the test stage add a job named "unit test" that also uses node:6 and runs npm install --progress=false followed by npm run unit. In the deploy stage add a job named "deploy" that installs rsync and openssh via apk, sets up an SSH key from the $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY variable, configures SSH to skip host key checking, and then rsyncs the dist/ folder to gitlab@37.187.126.110:~/vue-ci/.
